idea-plugin.name: TS Typed Functions
idea-plugin.description:
Navigate between TypeScript function-typed type aliases and the functions that implement them — even when the implementation does not name the alias.

Features

  • Gutter icon on each function-typed type alias linking to matching implementations.
  • Reverse gutter icon on top-level functions and const/let arrow/expression initializers, linking back to matching signatures.
  • Find Implementations of Type Signature action (default shortcut Ctrl+Alt+Shift+P / Cmd+Alt+Shift+P) for caret-based lookup.
  • Factory detection — top-level functions whose explicit return type names a signature alias are surfaced alongside direct implementations, marked [factory].

Matching is structural and loose: a function implements an alias when its parameter and return type names align with the alias signature, regardless of import path or whether the alias is named on the function itself. Class methods, object-literal methods, and generic aliases are out of scope.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release.
  • Gutter icons on TypeScript function-typed type aliases and their implementations.
  • Reverse gutter from implementations back to signatures.
  • Find Implementations of Type Signature action with default keymap binding.
  • Factory detection: top-level functions whose return type names a signature alias appear alongside direct implementations, marked [factory].

action.description: Find all functions whose signature matches this type alias
